title: 小红书九宫格拼图封面
prompt_template: A 3x3 grid collage layout for Xiaohongshu cover, 3:4 vertical format. The center cell (position 5) is the largest and shows the main {main_subject}. The 8 surrounding cells show 8 different detail shots of {main_subject} from various angles (close-up, wide, in-context, top-down, side, 45-degree, back, action shot). Each cell has 4px white border separators. Top center cell overlay: large bold Chinese headline "{headline_text}". Cohesive color grade across all 9 cells ({color_palette}), lifestyle photography style, 1024x1024.
